data.title: Huobi HTX releases Merkle Tree Reserve Proof for April 2025: Multi-currency Excess Reserves, and Asset Deposits Continue to Grow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official website of Huobi HTX, the Merkle tree asset proof data updated by Huobi HTX on April 1 showed that the overall asset reserve rate of the platform remained above 100%, and the platform's security strength continued to increase. The specific updated reserve rates are: BTC (101%), ETH (100%), TRX (105%), USDT (101%), HTX (105%), XRP (101%), DOGE (100%), SOL (101%).
The data shows that the overall asset deposit volume of Huobi HTX has increased significantly, among which USDT user assets have increased from about 665 million to 1.15 billion, an increase of more than 73% compared to March, showing a strong trend of net inflow of user assets, indicating that users continue to trust the platform and increase their asset holdings.
It is reported that a reserve rate higher than or equal to 100% means that the platform has the ability to redeem 100% of user assets, which is an important indicator for measuring the security and transparency of the platform. As one of the earliest platforms in the industry to adopt the Merkle tree verification mechanism, Huobi HTX has publicly disclosed reserve data for 30 consecutive months. Users can visit the "Asset-Reserve Proof Report" page on the Huobi HTX official website at any time to view the monthly updated reserve proof report.

data.title: Binance will launch the second round of voting to delist on April 10
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance will start the second batch of voting delisting activities on April 10.
The voting period will start in 30 minutes and last for seven days from 2025-04-10 04:00 (UTC) to 2025-04-16 23:59 (UTC) ("Voting Period"). Users must log in to their verified Binance account and hold at least 0.01 BNB in ​​their trading account throughout the voting period to be eligible for voting. During the voting period, each user can vote for up to 5 projects in the voting delisting pool, or choose projects with fewer votes. Each verified account can only be assigned one vote for each project.

data.title: An Ethereum OG address that has been silent for 2 years sells 10,702 ETH again
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, an Ethereum OG address sold 10,702 ETH (about 16.86 million US dollars) at an average price of 1,576 US dollars again after 2 years of silence.
The address obtained ETH as early as 2016, when the price was only 8 US dollars. He never sold it when the price of ETH exceeded 4,000 US dollars, but always chose to sell it when it fell sharply.

data.title: South Korea's five major banks call for relaxing restrictions on cooperation in the crypto industry and support one exchange to connect with multiple banks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News South Korea's five major commercial banks and several regional banks met with ruling party lawmakers this week, calling for the relaxation of restrictions on the number of banks that cooperate with crypto exchanges. Current regulations require each exchange to cooperate with only one bank to meet anti-money laundering regulations. Woori Bank President Zheng Zhenwan pointed out that this model limits user choices and affects system stability, and suggested allowing "one exchange to connect with multiple banks." At the same time, as the ban on institutional investment is gradually relaxed, many Korean exchanges are ready to welcome corporate customers to enter. (The Block)

data.title: The Fetch.ai team is suspected of selling 15 million FETs through DWF again
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the multi-signature address of the Fetch.ai team is suspected of selling 15 million FETs through DWF Labs again, worth $6.58 million.
Six hours ago, the tokens were transferred to the Binance recharge address of DWF Labs. In the past year, the team has transferred a total of 40 million FETs to CEX, with a total value of $43.17 million.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 82,000 USDT with a Narrowed 8.46% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 10, 2025, 03:07 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 82,000 USDT and is now trading at 81,975.789063 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 8.46% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: The crypto market rebounded across the board, with the AI ​​sector leading the way with a 15.82% increase, and ETH returned to above $1,600
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On April 10, according to SoSoValue data, Trump announced the suspension of taxation and reduction of tax rates for several countries. Affected by the news, the crypto market rebounded across the board, and the crypto sector generally rose by about 4% to 15% in 24 hours. Among them, the AI ​​sector led the rise by 15.82%, Bittensor (TAO), Fetch.ai (FET), and Render (RENDER) rose by 15.52%, 15.79%, and 16.71% in 24 hours respectively. In addition, Ethereum (ETH) rose by 13.77%, breaking through the $1,600 mark. Bitcoin (BTC) rose by 7.94%, once rising above $83,000.
It is worth mentioning that MAG7.ssi rose by 11.24%, DEFI.ssi rose by 15.92%, and MEME.ssi rose by 13.44%.
In other sectors, the DeFi sector rose 12.43% in 24 hours, of which Ondo Finance (ONDO) rose 23.87%; the PayFi sector rose 12.26%, and within the sector, XRP rose 14.13%; the Meme sector rose 11.87%, and Dogecoin (DOGE) rose 12.48%; the Layer2 sector rose 8.91%, and ex-MATIC (POL) rose 10.72%; the Layer1 sector rose 8.52%, Solana (SOL) and Cardano (ADA) rose 12.72% and 12.56% respectively; the CeFi sector rose 5.89%, and Hyperliquid (HYPE) rose 16.09%.
At the same time, the crypto sector index, which reflects the historical market trends of the sector, shows that the ssiAI, ssiDeFi, and ssiRWA indices rose by 16.27%, 13.79%, and 12.97% respectively in 24 hours.

data.title: Binance adjusts the step size of multiple spot trading pairs including OM, XRP, etc.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will adjust the step size (the minimum change unit of order quantity) of 15 spot trading pairs including OM/BTC and XRP/USDT at 07:00 (UTC) on April 17, 2025. The adjusted step size will be unified to 0.1. This update does not affect existing spot orders. API users can obtain the latest step size information through GET/api/v3/exchangeInfo. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: BTC fell below 82,000 USDT, and the 24-hour increase narrowed to 8.52%
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC fell below 82,000 USDT and is now at 81,999.9 USDT, with the 24-hour increase narrowed to 8.52%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: TRC20-USDT issuance exceeds 67.7 billion, setting a new record
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the latest news, the issuance of TRC20-USDT has increased to 67.7 billion, a record high. Since the beginning of this year, the TRON network has cumulatively issued nearly 8 billion USDT. As of now, TRC20-USDT accounts for 46.9% of the total issuance of USDT in the entire network, with 63.91 million accounts and a cumulative transfer of more than 2.43 billion transactions.
In addition, Sun Yuchen, the founder of TRON, recently stated at the "BUIDL 2025" summit that the market value of USDT on the TRON chain is expected to exceed US$100 billion this year.
TRC20-USDT is a stable currency anchored to the US dollar issued by Tether based on the TRON network. Its fast transfer speed and low handling fees have attracted a large number of users, and it has been supported by many exchanges such as Binance, HTX, OKX, Bitfinex, MEXC, KuCoin, Gate.io, and Poloniex. USDT based on the TRC20 version will greatly enhance TRON's existing decentralized application ecosystem, bring higher overall value storage and stronger decentralized exchange liquidity, and provide a more convenient blockchain entry for enterprise-level partners and institutional investors.
